name: HPP Browser Login — Human Presence Protocol
description: Replaces passwords and CAPTCHAs with cryptographic proof of human presence. Hardware-bound. Time-anchored. Privacy-preserving.
author: Agile On Target LLC
_content_scripts_rationale: HPP must inject on all URLs to detect pages that declare <meta name='hpp-enrollment'> and to intercept login form submissions. Without broad URL access, site declaration detection is impossible. A future version will support runtime permission registration for enrolled origins only.
_content_security_policy_dev: For local development, use: connect-src https://attest.humanpresenceprotocol.com http://127.0.0.1:9443 — never ship localhost in production manifest.
